reasons: Estes can amplify Uranus's extended-fight identity with team healing.
Uranus can stand forward and create space while Estes supports the formation behind him.

proof.summary: Uranus absorbs pressure over time, while Estes keeps the frontline and nearby teammates healthy.
worksBestWhen: The team fights in a connected formation.
Uranus stays within healing range during major fights.
failureCases: Uranus dives too far away from Estes.
Enemy anti-heal or burst reduces sustain value.

reasons: Rafaela's healing and speed help Uranus keep pressure without fully disengaging.
Uranus benefits from speed support when chasing or repositioning as a disruptive frontline.

proof.summary: Rafaela helps Uranus stay active in long fights through movement and healing support.
worksBestWhen: Uranus uses speed support to zone instead of chasing into isolation.
failureCases: Enemy burst forces Rafaela to heal other targets first.

reasons: Angela can attach to Uranus when he becomes the main fight anchor.
Her shield and speed support can help Uranus stay disruptive while absorbing pressure.

proof.summary: Uranus creates frontline pressure, while Angela adds survivability and movement during his commit window.
worksBestWhen: Uranus is the main hero holding space for the team.
Angela attaches during a decisive fight, not during passive lane pressure.
failureCases: Uranus is only split-pushing away from the team.
Angela's attach is mistimed when Uranus is not under meaningful pressure.

reasons: Floryn can support Uranus when he pressures side angles or extended fights.
Uranus's sustain plan becomes more stable when additional healing covers burst windows.

proof.summary: Floryn adds sustain support to Uranus's long-fight frontline plan.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves healing for the moment Uranus absorbs heavy damage.
Uranus uses the sustain window to hold space, not to chase alone.
failureCases: Enemy burst or anti-heal removes sustain value.
Uranus is too deep when the team cannot follow.

reasons: Uranus can occupy the frontline and absorb attention while Hanabi attacks from behind.
Hanabi benefits from Uranus forcing a front-to-back fight where enemies stay grouped longer.

proof.summary: Uranus creates durable frontline space, while Hanabi uses that space to deal backline teamfight damage.
worksBestWhen: Uranus zones divers away from Hanabi.
Hanabi keeps safe spacing behind Uranus.
failureCases: Uranus pressures too far forward and leaves Hanabi exposed.
